title: antholyza aethiopica var. vittigera
intro: Antholyza aethiopica var. vittigera, also known as African corn silk or Corn Silk, is a plant-based ingredient derived from the stigmas of the Cornflower plant (Centaurea cyanus) or another similar source, although some sources claim it is the plant itself Antholyza aethiopica var. vittigera. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Antholyza aethiopica var. vittigera include relief from urinary issues, such as kidney stones and incontinence, and its anti-inflammatory properties may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of Antholyza aethiopica var. vittigera often come in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, and may be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
